deployment_context: Out-of-sample holdout packet. Public case_law_known_item output for query: C-307/22 GDPR medical records access

S.evidence: Every visible result has a public source URL and source-system label.

Q.evidence: The query, source endpoint, snapshot and rank window are recorded.

H.evidence: The benchmark compares returned records with an issue-defined high-authority set.

K.evidence: The benchmark compares returned records with an issue-defined counter-material set.

T.evidence: The output can be inspected by a reviewer but does not create a party-facing contestation pathway.

L.evidence: The query, manifest, scenario and harness result are logged as reproducible artifacts.

output_units.claim: Public search rank 1 makes this material visible: Judgment - 26/10/2023 - FT (Copies du dossier médical) Case C-307/22 Reports of Cases published in the electronic Reports of Cases (Court Reports - general) Links to the texts
